subcodes.first_line: O ye steadfast ones in the Covenant of His Holiness Ismu'llah al-Mihdi, upon him be the Most Glorious Glory of God and upon him be the praise of God [3.5s]... ...O Thou Who art Self-Sufficient! Set those birds of the meadow on their flight; make those nightingales of the rose-garden
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان پیمان حضرت اسم الله المهدی علیه بهاء الله الابهی و علیه ثناء الله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @unity in diversity, @call to action, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
